sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114708" key="xrhstourgi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρηστουργία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n114708.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">good deed, service,</tr_> Iamb(?).ap.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Berl.Sitz.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1875p.4</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
